extension.summary: Kodiman's Wasteland Beta – Endzeit-Skin für Kodi Omega
Kodiman's Wasteland Beta – Post-apocalyptic skin for Kodi Omega
extension.description: Beta-Version 2.0.0 des postapokalyptischen Wasteland-Skins für Kodi Omega. Rostbraune Akzente, aschegraue Paneele und eine raue industrielle Ästhetik. Inspiriert von Aeon Tajo.
Beta version 2.0.0 of the post-apocalyptic Wasteland skin for Kodi Omega. Rust-brown accents, ash-grey panels, and a rough industrial aesthetic. Inspired by Aeon Tajo.
